# Security

Kenogram is pre-release software. Security fixes are made on `main`.

Report vulnerabilities through GitHub's private
[**Report a vulnerability**](https://github.com/idolum-ai/kenogram/security/advisories/new)
flow. Include the affected commit, host and
Podman versions, a minimal declaration or reproducer, observed impact, and any
suggested mitigation. Do not open a public issue containing exploit details or
credentials.
